ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Ajmera Realty & Infra India Ltd. has filed a routine compliance certificate under SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. This document confirms that the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, MUFG Intime India, efficiently processed all share dematerialization requests, ensuring timely confirmation, cancellation, and updating of records in adherence to regulatory timelines. There are no apparent red flags or material negative impacts indicated; rather, it reflects standard operational compliance.
